query_normalized: asymptotic behavior of random matrix eigenvalues with sparse perturbations mathematics
rationale: This paper directly addresses the user's question by studying the asymptotic behavior (specifically Gaussian fluctuations) of eigenvalues for sparse random matrices (Erdős-Rényi graphs), which satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it measures the exact same mathematical mechanism and variables (eigenvalue fluctuations in sparse regimes) the user is inquiring about.
